key_findings: CRITICAL: VITE_AUTH_BYPASS defaults to true; ProtectedRoute bypassed in dev (and production if env not set)
README claims React Query + Zustand + Socket.io — none are installed; code uses custom fetch wrapper, React Context, and native ws
Server build fails: npm deps not installed in current env (missing zod, crypto, express type defs — not a real code bug)
Frontend type-check passes cleanly; build fails due to missing node_modules (tsconfig type refs to vite/client, node)
All public-facing pages (Landing, About, Blogs, Courses, Careers, Contact, Business, Corporate, StudentCounselling, Workshop) use 100% hardcoded static data — no API calls
Dashboard sub-pages (Mood, Journal, Confessional, Notifications, Profile, Settings) ARE wired to apiService with real endpoints
Dashboard widget pages (Sessions, Connections, Constellation, Meditation) contain hardcoded mock data arrays
AdminDashboard: hardcoded metrics, no real API wiring
PractitionerDashboard in /src/pages/practitioner/ is orphaned (not in router) — duplicate of /src/pages/dashboard/PractitionerDashboard.tsx
Auth mock: 4 hardcoded test accounts in AuthContext with btoa-encoded fake JWT tokens
Prisma schema exists with full model definitions; 2 migration SQL files; seed-dev.ts present
Server has full module structure (15+ modules) with controllers/services/validators but many are placeholder or partially implemented
WebSocket service is implemented client-side but no evidence of active wiring to dashboard components
docker-compose uses 'kimi' as DB user/password — suggests copy-paste from another project
CI/CD: quality.yml uses `npm run lint || true` (lint failures silenced), no server tests exist
Payment integration: Razorpay keys optional/commented out — payments not live
Email, storage, AI (OpenAI), Daily.co video — all commented out in server .env.example — not active
.env.local committed to repo (security risk — should be gitignored)
CRITICAL SECURITY: enableDevRoutes defaults to TRUE in production (isDevelopment || isProduction); dev-login and dev-helper routes exposed in prod
CRITICAL SECURITY: dev-helper GET /dev-helper/dev-create-user/:email/:password/:name creates DB users via URL params with no auth
CRITICAL SECURITY: entire /admin router has NO auth middleware; ~80 admin endpoints unprotected (all 501 but would be live when implemented)
Auth model: JWT HS256; access 15min in memory; refresh 7d httpOnly cookie; SHA-256 hash in DB; token family rotation; account lockout after 5 fails
Duplicate implementations: controllers/auth.controller.ts vs modules/auth/auth.controller.ts (modules/ is dead/unused by routes)
Duplicate implementations: routes/notifications.ts (inline, LIVE) vs controllers/notifications.controller.ts (orphaned/unused)
Duplicate services: services/tokens.service.ts vs modules/auth/tokens.service.ts
Duplicate routes: routes/test.ts and routes/test-new.ts are near-identical files both mounted
Cache: in-memory Map only (no Redis); comment says replace with Redis for production
Email: console-only fallback; no real provider (Resend/SendGrid/SES commented as TODO); templates defined but not sent
Queue: synchronous in-memory processor only; no BullMQ/Redis; comment says replace for production
Storage: in-memory Map only; no S3/R2; avatars on local disk at /uploads/avatars/ via multer+sharp
WebSocket: ws library (not socket.io); auth via URL token query param; events: connected/ping/pong/mark_read/ack/notification; heartbeat keepalive
Rate limiting: express-rate-limit (IP-based) + in-memory user-based limiter; defined tiers: auth(5/15m) api(100/15m) strict(3/15m) upload(20/hr) ai(30/15m); AI routes have no rate limiter applied
Missing DB models for: Blog posts, Courses/Enrollment, Community posts, Shop/Products/Orders, Events, NGO, Corporate accounts, Career positions
TherapistAvailability model: schema only; no code reads/writes it; slot booking system not implemented
routes/index.ts mounts ALL routes under BOTH /api/v1 AND /api (double-mount); every endpoint accessible via two paths
therapy/ai/astrology/payments/courses/blog/community/shop/events/careers/ngo/corporate domains: ALL routes return 501
SUPER_ADMIN role defined in schema and contracts but no route uses SUPER_ADMIN-specific logic
twoFactor field in UserSettings stored but not enforced anywhere in auth flow
Session.notes comment says encrypted at rest but no encryption implemented in controller
modules/ directory (~50 files): entirely disconnected from routes/; routes only use controllers/ directly

README claims Zustand — not installed (package.json evidence)
README claims Socket.io — server uses 'ws' package, not socket.io
